options.name: -all
options.description: Return a list of all issued message IDs as a Tcl result. This does not include suppressed message IDs.

options.name: -count
options.description: Return count of every message when -errors, -warnings or -all is specified.

options.name: -detail
options.description: Return list of detail message of specified prefix.

options.name: -errors
options.description: Return a list of issued error message IDs as a Tcl result.

options.name: -prefix
options.description: Return a list of issued error message IDs matched with -prefix specified as a Tcl result.

options.name: -summary
options.description: Return message summary of specified prefix.

options.name: -suppressed
options.description: Return a list of suppressed message IDs as a Tcl result.

options.name: -warnings
options.description: Return a list of issued warning message IDs as a Tcl result.
